summary: Comprehensive e2e testing of the 3-role (admin/seller/buyer/both) migration for the Cardamom Spices Centre B2B marketplace. All 22 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Register page shows Buy/Sell/Both role selector; Admin Dashboard shows Users (with role + status badges), Pending Products, Quotes, Bids, All Products tabs; Seller Dashboard (/seller) shows My Products, Bids Received, Add Product and stat cards; Buyer Dashboard (/dashboard) shows My Bids & My Quotes tabs; Product Detail shows 'Sold by Cardamom Spices Centre' (seller name). Full workflow validated: register seller -> admin approves -> seller creates product (pending) -> admin approves product -> buyer places bid -> seller accepts bid.
passed_tests: BACKEND: POST /api/auth/register accepts role=buyer/seller/both (422 for invalid 'customer')
BACKEND: Duplicate email returns 400
BACKEND: Admin login returns role=admin, status=approved
BACKEND: GET /api/products returns only approval_status=approved
BACKEND: POST /api/seller/products creates product with seller_id/seller_name, approval_status=pending
BACKEND: GET /api/seller/products returns only own products
BACKEND: Pending seller product NOT visible in public /api/products
BACKEND: Buyer cannot POST /api/seller/products (403)
BACKEND: GET /api/admin/products returns ALL products (pending+approved+rejected)
BACKEND: PATCH /api/admin/products/{id}/status?approval_status=approved works; product becomes public
BACKEND: GET /api/admin/products?approval_status=pending filters correctly
BACKEND: GET /api/admin/users returns users with roles populated
BACKEND: POST /api/bids by approved buyer attaches seller_id/seller_name from product
BACKEND: GET /api/bids/my returns own bids
BACKEND: GET /api/seller/bids returns bids on seller's products
BACKEND: GET /api/seller/bids/summary returns total/today/pending/accepted/rejected
BACKEND: PUT /api/seller/bids/{id} with notes accepts bid (reviewed_by=seller, seller_notes saved)
BACKEND: PUT /api/seller/bids/nonexistent returns 404
BACKEND: Buyer cannot GET /api/seller/bids (403)
BACKEND: POST /api/upload by seller returns path (file upload works)
BACKEND: POST /api/upload by buyer returns 403
FRONTEND: /register page shows role selector with Buy / Sell / Both cards
FRONTEND: Admin dashboard (/admin) shows Users tab with Buyer role badge and pending/approved/rejected status
FRONTEND: Admin dashboard shows Pending Products tab, Quotes, Bids, All Products
FRONTEND: Seller dashboard (/seller) shows Seller Dashboard header, My Products + Bids Received tabs, stat cards, Add Product button
FRONTEND: Buyer dashboard (/dashboard) shows Buyer Dashboard header, My Bids + My Quotes tabs, stat cards
FRONTEND: Product Detail page displays 'Sold by Cardamom Spices Centre' (seller_name), Place a Bid + Request a Quote buttons
FRONTEND: Navbar role-based routing - admin login redirects to /admin, seller token -> /seller, buyer token -> /dashboard all render correctly
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 1225 lines - should be split into routers (auth/admin/seller/buyer/upload) for maintainability.
Startup migration `update_many({approval_status: {$exists: false}}, ...)` runs on every startup; fine but consider one-shot flag.
CORS_ORIGINS defaults to '*' when env missing - acceptable for preview but tighten for prod.
Admin /api/admin/products GET lacks response_model (inconsistent vs others using response_model=List[Product]).

test_credentials.test_users_created: TEST_seller_*, TEST_buyer_*, TEST_both_*, TEST_uiseller_*, TEST_uibuyer_* (all with password test123)

seed_data_creation: Test sellers/buyers and one test product per run created via API. Admin auto-created on startup. Products seeded only if collection is empty.
context_for_next_testing_agent: 3-role migration fully working. Key endpoints: POST /api/auth/register {role:buyer/seller/both}; PATCH /api/admin/users/{id}/status?status=approved; POST /api/seller/products (pending); PATCH /api/admin/products/{id}/status?approval_status=approved; POST /api/bids (buyer, not /api/bids/place); GET /api/seller/bids + PUT /api/seller/bids/{id} with body {status,notes}; GET /api/seller/bids/summary. Frontend routes: /admin, /seller, /dashboard. Register role cards work (Buy/Sell/Both). Seed products have seller_name='Cardamom Spices Centre'.
